wikipedia.title: Richmond, California
wikipedia.summary: Richmond is a city in western Contra Costa County, California, United States. The city was incorporated on August 3, 1905, and has a city council. wikipedia.title: Berkeley, California
wikipedia.summary: Berkeley is a city on the eastern shore of San Francisco Bay in northern Alameda County, California, United States.
